title: Corpus Hermeticum I: Poimandres
description: The divine mind Poimandres reveals to Hermes the creation of the world, the descent of souls, and the way of return to God.
introduction: The divine mind Poimandres reveals to Hermes the creation of the world, the descent of souls, and the way of return to God.

translation.text: I am Poimandres, the Mind of the Sovereignty. I know what you wish, and I am with you everywhere.
This is the final good for those who have received knowledge: to become God.
